# Native Fragments Full Docs

Native Fragments is a zero-dependency, zero-build frontend framework for agents
building AI-friendly web applications.

## Install

```sh
npm create @nativefragments/app@latest my-app
cd my-app
npm run dev
```

## Human Docs

- https://docs.nativefragments.org/
- https://docs.nativefragments.org/getting-started
- https://docs.nativefragments.org/reference

## Agent Docs

- https://docs.nativefragments.org/index.md
- https://docs.nativefragments.org/getting-started.md
- https://docs.nativefragments.org/routing.md
- https://docs.nativefragments.org/fragments.md
- https://docs.nativefragments.org/components.md
- https://docs.nativefragments.org/agent-friendly.md
- https://docs.nativefragments.org/reference.md

## Core Package

```sh
npm i @nativefragments/core
```

Server imports:

```js
import { html, route } from "@nativefragments/core/server";
import { createCloudflareHandler } from "@nativefragments/core/cloudflare";
```

Browser imports:

```js
import { installFragmentNavigation } from "/nativefragments/router.js";
import { shadow, sheet } from "/nativefragments/component.js";
```

## Agent Skill

```sh
node_modules/@nativefragments/core/skills/nativefragments/SKILL.md
```

## App Structure

```txt
worker.js
site/routes.js
site/shell.js
site/pages/home.js
public/app/client.js
public/nativefragments/router.js
public/nativefragments/component.js
```

## Principles

- HTML is the first payload.
- Fragment navigation upgrades real links.
- Custom Elements own behavior.
- Shadow DOM scopes component CSS.
- Source files stay small and explicit for agents.
- Runtime output remains readable HTML and browser modules.
